name: ECS Instance with EVS
description: 查询ECS资源及其关联的EVS资源
expression: SELECT ECS_EVS.id AS ecs_id, EVS.id AS evs_id FROM ( SELECT id, evs_id FROM ( SELECT id, transform(properties.ExtVolumesAttached, x -> x.id) AS evs_list FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' ) ECS CROSS JOIN UNNEST(evs_list) AS t (evs_id) ) ECS_EVS, ( SELECT id FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' ) EVS WHERE ECS_EVS.evs_id = EVS.id

name: ECS Instance with EIP
description: 查询ECS资源及其关联的弹性公网IP资源
expression: SELECT ECS.id AS ECS_id, publicIpAddress AS ip_address FROM ( SELECT id, transform(properties.addresses, x -> x.addr) AS ip_list FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' ) ECS, ( SELECT name, properties.publicIpAddress FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'publicips' AND properties.type = 'EIP' AND properties.status = 'ACTIVE' ) EIP WHERE CONTAINS (ECS.ip_list, EIP.name)

name: Resources Time
description: 查询资源的创建时间和更新时间
expression: SELECT id, provider, type, name, created, updated, region_id FROM resources

name: Count ECS by region_id
description: 查询每个区域内弹性云服务器的数量
expression: SELECT region_id, count(*) AS num FROM resources WHERE type = 'cloudservers' AND provider = 'ecs' GROUP BY region_id

name: Count resources more then 100 by region_id
description: 查询每个区域内数量大于100的资源类型
expression: WITH counts AS ( SELECT region_id, provider, type, count(*) AS number FROM resources GROUP BY region_id, provider, type ) SELECT * FROM counts WHERE number > 100

name: List OBS Bucket
description: 列举对象存储桶
expression: SELECT id, name, region_id FROM resources WHERE provider = 'obs' AND type = 'buckets'

name: Fuzzy Search resource
description: 对象存储桶模糊查询
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'obs' AND type = 'buckets' AND name LIKE '%figure%'

name: List resources by tags
description: 通过标签筛选资源
expression: SELECT id, name, provider, type FROM resources WHERE any_match(tag, x -> (x.key = 'key'))

name: List resources by ep_id
description: 通过企业项目筛选资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE ep_id = '0'

name: Running ECS
description: 查询运行中的弹性云服务器
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND properties.status = 'ACTIVE'

name: Stopped ECS
description: 查询关机状态的弹性云服务器名称
expression: SELECT id, name FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND properties.status = 'SHUTOFF'

name: Error ECS
description: 查询处于异常状态的弹性云服务器
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND properties.status = 'ERROR'

name: EVS by Size
description: 查询特定规格的云硬盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND properties.size = 100

name: EVS in-use
description: 查询已绑定的云硬盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND properties.status = 'in-use'

name: List VPC
description: 列举VPC资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'vpcs'

name: Unused Volume
description: 查询未挂载给任何云服务器的云硬盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND properties.status != 'in-use'

name: List Unencrypted GeminiDB Instances
description: 查询所有未设置KMS加密的GeminiDB资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'nosql' AND type = 'instances' AND (properties.kmsKey is NULL OR properties.kmsKey = '')

name: List all IAM users by created
description: 查询所有创建时间在2018-12-01T00:00和2019-02-28T00:00之间的IAM用户
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'iam' AND type = 'users' AND date_diff('hour', date_parse( '2018-12-01T00:00:00Z', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%sZ'), created) > 0 AND date_diff('hour', created, date_parse( '2019-02-28T00:00:00Z', '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%sZ')) > 0

name: List all RDS resources by engine and version
description: 查询所有引擎为mysql，版本为5.7.41.230400的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND properties.engineName ='mysql' AND properties.engineVersion = '5.7.41.230400'

name: RDS resources Publicly Accessible
description: 查询所有可以公网访问的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND properties.eip is not null

name: Non-compliant resources
description: 列举所有的Config合规审计中评估资源为不合规的合规规则
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'config' AND type = 'policyAssignments' AND properties.non_compliant_resource_count > 0

name: Count ELB Instances
description: 根据ELB资源类型查询ELB资源数量
expression: SELECT type, count(*) AS num FROM resources WHERE provider = 'elb' GROUP BY type

name: Count by Compliant
description: 根据Config合规状态查询合规规则数量
expression: SELECT sum( if(properties.non_compliant_resource_count > 0, 1, 0)), sum( if(properties.non_compliant_resource_count > 0, 0, 1)) FROM resources WHERE provider = 'config' AND type = 'policyAssignments'

name: Count Non-compliant
description: 查询评估资源为非合规的合规规则，并按不合规资源数量降序排列
expression: SELECT id, name, properties.non_compliant_resource_count FROM resources WHERE type = 'policyAssignments' AND provider = 'config' AND properties.non_compliant_resource_count > 0 GROUP BY id, name, properties.non_compliant_resource_count ORDER BY properties.non_compliant_resource_count DESC

name: ECS Instances by IP Address
description: 列举所有的包含特定网络接口的ECS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND any_match(properties.addresses,x -> x.addr= '21.108.3.93')

name: ECS Instances by Security Group
description: 查询关联安全组id为'6c7c5a60-3878-4e68-b6ad-0fc55123549e'的ECS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND any_match(properties.securityGroup,x->x.id = '6c7c5a60-3878-4e68-b6ad-0fc55123549e')

name: ECS Instances Attached to Volume
description: 根据磁盘查询ECS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND any_match(properties.ExtVolumesAttached,x -> contains(transform(properties.ExtVolumesAttached, x -> x.id),'c261154b-5ccc-494b-930c-685a633c1a3b'))

name: ECS resources within a VPC
description: 根据VPC ID查询ECS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND properties.metadata.vpcId = '1e5a9b93-f0ca-4fb6-8b8e-8ab8e909d356'

name: ECS resources by IMS
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'ecs' AND type = 'cloudservers' AND properties.metadata.meteringImageId='0e439277-7572-46e2-a9fe-729a61489b19'

name: ELB resources by type
description: 根据资源类型查询ELB资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'elb' AND type = 'loadbalancers'

name: RDS Instances by Security Group
description: 列举所有包含在安全组63c4afc5-a8ab-4261-a4e1-0a5b4358b820中的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND substr(properties.securityGroupId, 3, 36)='63c4afc5-a8ab-4261-a4e1-0a5b4358b820'

name: RDS Instances by flavorCode
description: 列举所有flavorCode为'rds.mysql.n1.large.4.ha'的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND properties.flavorCode='rds.mysql.n1.large.4.ha'

name: RDS Instances by Database engine
description: 查询引擎为mysql的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND properties.engineName='mysql'

name: RDS Instances by Storage type
description: 列举所有存储类型为ULTRAHIGH的RDS资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'rds' AND type = 'instances' AND properties.volumeType = 'ULTRAHIGH'

name: Encrypted EVS Volumes
description: 查询加密的EVS磁盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND properties.encrypted

name: Unencrypted EVS Volumes
description: 查询未加密的EVS磁盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND NOT properties.encrypted

name: EVS Volumes by type
description: 查询所有的SATA类型的EVS磁盘
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'evs' AND type = 'volumes' AND properties.volumeType = 'SATA'

name: VPS Ports in-use
description: 列举所有在使用中的VPC网络接口
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'ports' AND properties.status = 'ACTIVE'

name: Security Group Supporting TCP Protocol
description: 列举所有可以支持tcp协议的安全组
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'securityGroups' AND any_match(properties.security_group_rules,x -> x.protocol = 'tcp')

name: IAM user by IAM policy
description: 列举所有关联IAM策略‘294f1ad84e3344bda00ca285db430635’的IAM用户
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'iam' AND type = 'users' AND any_match(properties.policy_list,x -> contains(properties.policy_list,'294f1ad84e3344bda00ca285db430635'))

name: IAM policy by IAM user
description: 列举所有关联某个IAM用户的IAM策略
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'iam' AND type = 'policies' AND contains((SELECT properties.policy_list AS target FROM resources WHERE id = '0a84b3b88c80d4d91fd0c01761f99063'), id)

name: VPC Public IPs by Ports
description: 列举所有的关联id为1e2c43c1-18b1-4fae-a774-33cd74fa2b70的ports的弹性公网。
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'publicips' AND properties.vnic.portId = '1e2c43c1-18b1-4fae-a774-33cd74fa2b70'

name: VPC Public IPs by IP Address
description: 根据IP地址查询VPC弹性IP
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'publicips' AND properties.vnic.privateIpAddress = '10.66.164.236'

name: VPC Public IPs by Pool
description: 列举所有在5_g-vm ip池中的VPC弹性IP
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'vpc' AND type = 'publicips' AND properties.publicipPoolName = '5_g-vm'

name: NAT Gateway with state available
description: 列举所有的可使用的NAT资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE provider = 'nat' AND type = 'natGateways' AND properties.status = 'ACTIVE'

name: Resources without tags
description: 查询没有标签的资源
expression: SELECT * FROM resources WHERE cardinality(tag) = 0
